title: AN ACT TO CONVERT THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF REAL IN THE PROVINCE OF QUEZON INTO A REGULAR MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3755 / 59 OG No. 50, 8565 (December 16, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3754, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT TO CONVERT THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF REAL IN THE PROVINCE OF QUEZON INTO A REGULAR MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Municipal District of Real, Province of Quezon, is hereby converted into a regular municipality.

SEC. 2. The present mayor, vice-mayor and councilors of the Municipal District of Real shall be the mayor, vice-mayor and councilors, respectively, of the new municipality until their successors shall have been elected in the next regular elections for provincial and municipal officials and shall have qualified.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
